title: Fix 'Failed to load users' error in UsersControlsPanel

requirements.summary: Fix the admin authorization failure in UsersControlsPanel that causes 'Failed to load users. Please try again.' error by ensuring the admin actor is correctly initialized with the secret token before calling getAllUsers
acceptanceCriteria: Opening the Users & Controls tab in the admin panel displays the list of registered users without any error.
The 'Failed to load users. Please try again.' error message does not appear when the admin is authenticated.
The admin actor call to fetch all users succeeds without an authorization rejection.
Maintenance mode toggle continues to work correctly after the fix.

file_operations.description: Update the component to use the admin actor from useAdminActor hook instead of useActor, ensuring it waits for both the actor and admin initialization before attempting to fetch users. Modify the useGetAllUsers query hook call to properly handle the loading state during admin actor initialization. Add proper error boundary handling for authorization failures and display user-friendly error messages.

Update the useGetAllUsers hook to accept an admin actor parameter and ensure it only executes the query when the admin actor is fully initialized. Add proper enabled condition that checks both actor availability and admin initialization status. Include retry logic with exponential backoff for transient failures while preventing retries on authorization errors.
